hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, re, os
path = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH', '')
if 'Inbox' in path:
    name = os.path.basename(path)
    if not re.match(r'\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}_\\w+_.+\\.md', name):
        print(f'WARNING: {name} does not follow YYYY-MM-DD_Name_Title.md convention')
" "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"
bash -c 'if echo "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q "ORCHESTRATOR.md"; then echo "REMINDER: Did you also update Team/roster.md?"; fi'
